subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me a captive to fate and destiny, engulfed in seas of tribulation and calamity, cast down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی اسیرا للقدر و القضاء و غریقا فی بحار المصائب و البلاء طریحا
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
